title: Product brief
description: A compact brief for a manual Product Preflight. This schema records assumptions; it does not validate demand, purchase intent, or market size.

one_sentence.description: What it is, for whom, and what it helps them do.

primary_segment_assumption.description: The assumed segment or context. Use segment-first language, not a fictional persona.

problem.description: The repeated situation, job, or constraint that creates the need.

proposed_solution.description: The proposed workflow, behavior, or decision change.

trust_needs.description: What would make the idea feel credible, bounded, or safe to evaluate.

reachability.description: Where real people in the assumed segment could be reached for a Smallest Real Anchor.

riskiest_assumption.description: The assumption that most needs to be challenged before building.

out_of_scope_claims.description: Claims this brief must not support, such as representative conclusions, real user voices, synthetic testimonials, or validated purchase intent.

kill_criteria.description: Pre-written criteria that would narrow, pause, or stop the idea.

smallest_real_anchor_candidate.description: A candidate for the smallest real-world action that could reduce uncertainty.
